name: Japan Airlines

carryOn.notes: Total carry-on weight including personal item must be under 10 kg.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Japan Airlines include free checked bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, JAL includes 2 free checked bags (23 kg each) on flights between Japan and the Americas for economy passengers.
